subcodes.first_line: Thy sister hath attained Our presence, and We heard mention of thee from her. We make mention of thee in this mighty Book. Say: O my God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضرت اختک لدی الوجه و سمعنا ذکرک منها ذکرناک بهذا الکتاب العظیم قولی الهی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for women, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
